series_metadata.series_description: Contribution slips or vouchers contain information about the customer''s account. The contribution slip is used to verify account information and investment instructions when a payment is made. A voucher comes from a payroll company and includes information used by the Ohio Tuition Trust Authority to identify a customer''s account and deposit instructions. Confidential - Revised Code 3334.11.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Image ; Electronic: Images are kept life of contract
